title: Sandbox Memory Generation and Persistence
description: Async pipeline that serializes sandbox run rollouts, extracts per-rollout memories (phase 1), and consolidates them into long-term agent memory (phase 2) when the session closes.
use_cases: Enqueue Run Result — caller provides RunResultBase + rollout_id; manager serializes via build_rollout_payload_from_result() and appends to per-rollout JSONL file in sessions_dir
Enqueue Rollout Payload — low-level enqueue; validates rollout_id (file-safe regex), orders fields, writes JSONL via write_rollout()

Process Rollout File (Phase 1) — MemoryWorker reads JSONL, renders phase-1 prompt, runs gpt-5.4-mini via Runner.run(), validates RolloutExtractionArtifacts, writes raw_memories/<rollout_id>.md and rollout_summaries/<slug>.md
Flush & Finalize — pre-stop hook; drains queue, waits for worker, triggers phase-2 consolidation, unregisters manager

Phase 2 Consolidation — builds PhaseTwoInputSelection (capped at max_raw_memories_for_consolidation, default 256, max 4096), rebuilds raw_memories.md, runs gpt-5.4 SandboxAgent via Runner.run() with consolidation prompt, writes phase_two_selection.json
Ensure Memory Layout — creates directory tree: sessions_dir, memories_dir, raw_memories/, rollout_summaries/, skills/; ensures MEMORY.md and memory_summary.md exist
Get or Create Manager — factory keyed by (memories_dir, sessions_dir) layout tuple per session; raises UserError on conflicting configs or overlapping layout dirs
key_classes: SandboxMemoryGenerationManager: orchestrates full pipeline; holds asyncio.Queue + worker Task + flush lock; registers pre_stop_hook on session
SandboxMemoryStorage: all sandbox filesystem I/O; reads/writes JSONL rollouts, raw memory .md files, rollout summaries, phase_two_selection.json
RolloutTerminalMetadata (Pydantic): terminal_state in {completed|interrupted|cancelled|failed|max_turns_exceeded|guardrail_tripped}, exception_type, exception_message, has_final_output
PhaseTwoSelectionItem (frozen dataclass): rollout_id, updated_at, rollout_path, rollout_summary_file, terminal_state
PhaseTwoInputSelection (frozen dataclass): selected list, retained_rollout_ids set, removed list
interaction_flow: 1. SandboxRuntime → Manager.enqueue_result(result, rollout_id) after each sandbox run
3. Manager.enqueue_rollout_payload() validates rollout_id, calls SandboxMemoryStorage.ensure_layout(), appends JSONL via write_rollout() to sessions_dir/<rollout_id>.jsonl
5. flush() sorts unique rollout files, starts MemoryWorker task, enqueues file paths, awaits queue.join()
6. MemoryWorker._process_rollout_file() per file: reads JSONL → render_phase_one_prompt() → run_phase_one(config, prompt, RunConfig(sandbox=session)) via gpt-5.4-mini
7. Phase 1 output validated as RolloutExtractionArtifacts; writes raw_memories/<id>.md and rollout_summaries/<id>_<slug>.md in parallel (asyncio.gather)
8. flush() sends _STOP sentinel, awaits worker task
9. Manager._run_phase_two(): storage.build_phase_two_input_selection() → PhaseTwoInputSelection (sorted by updated_at desc, capped)
11. run_phase_two(): creates SandboxAgent(sandbox-memory-phase-two), renders consolidation prompt, Runner.run(agent, prompt) via gpt-5.4
13. _unregister_memory_generation_manager() removes manager from WeakKeyDictionary keyed by session
key_relationships: SandboxMemoryGenerationManager creates asyncio.Task (_worker) for background processing
Layout key is tuple(memories_dir, sessions_dir) — enforces isolation between different memory layouts

file_layout.sessions_dir: <rollout_id>.jsonl — one JSONL per rollout, appended during session
file_layout.memories_dir/raw_memories/<rollout_id>.m: phase-1 raw memory with frontmatter metadata
file_layout.memories_dir/raw_memories.md: concatenated selected raw memories for phase-2 input
file_layout.memories_dir/MEMORY.md: consolidated agent memory (written by phase-2 SandboxAgent)
file_layout.memories_dir/phase_two_selection.json: persisted selection of rollouts processed by phase 2

business_rules: Excluded item types from memory: compaction, image_generation_call, reasoning
Phase-2 selection sorted by updated_at descending; older rollouts pruned when limit exceeded
Multiple Memory capabilities per session allowed only if they use distinct (memories_dir, sessions_dir) pairs
flush() is idempotent via _stopped flag; safe to call multiple times
important_notes: MemoryRunConfig referenced in scope name maps to RunConfig(sandbox=SandboxRunConfig(session=self._session)) — no separate class. PhaseTwo is run_phase_two() function (not a class). Memory items filtered: only tool calls/outputs included (apply_patch, shell, mcp, function calls etc).
